# LLM Information File for anandhu-kannan.in

## Website Purpose
Portfolio website for Anandhu Kannan - Full Stack Developer & CEH v13 Cybersecurity Expert from Kerala, India.

## Primary Content Areas

### Home Section
- Main hero: Anandhu Kannan, Full Stack Developer & Security Expert
- Status: Open to opportunities
- Technologies: React, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Django, Python, AI/ML

### About Section
- 3+ years of professional development experience
- CEH v13 Certified Cybersecurity Expert
- Built 10+ production applications
- Industries: Healthcare, e-commerce, education, automation

### Services Offered
- Full Stack Web Development (MERN, Django)
- Backend Development (Node.js, Python, Django)
- Frontend Development (React.js, TypeScript)
- Cybersecurity Consulting (Ethical Hacking, Penetration Testing)
- API Development and Microservices
- AI/ML Engineering
- Database Design and Optimization

### Skills & Expertise
**Languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Java, Bash
**Frontend:** React.js, Redux, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
**Backend:** Node.js, Express, Django, Flask
**Databases:** MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL
**DevOps & Tools:** Docker, Git, CI/CD, Burp Suite, Nmap, Metasploit, OWASP ZAP
**Security:** CEH v13, Ethical Hacking, Penetration Testing, OWASP Top 10
**AI/ML:** TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy

### Certifications
- Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH v13) - EC-Council, 2023
- MITRE ATT&CK v13 Foundations - AttackIQ Academy, 2023

### Projects Highlighted
1. **AI Oral Cancer Detection & Biopsy Guidance System**
   - Swin UNet deep learning model with 92%+ accuracy
   - Patent filed in collaboration with FISAT and Annoor Dental College
   - Status: Production-ready on Raspberry Pi

2. **AI Mock Interview Platform**
   - Interview preparation with HR, technical, aptitude modules
   - Local LLM integration with adaptive difficulty
   - Real-time scoring on communication, accuracy, confidence

3. **ApplyGoat Browser Extension**
   - Job automation platform
   - 1000+ active users
   - Built with React.js, Node.js, MongoDB

- NSS College, Rajakumari

### Content Guidelines
- Focus: Professional services, portfolio projects, security expertise
- Tone: Professional, technical, accessible
- Target Audience: Potential clients, recruiters, tech professionals
- Keywords: Full Stack Developer, MERN, Cybersecurity, CEH, Kerala developer

### Site Structure
- Single-page portfolio with scroll sections
- Additional page: /gallery for visual portfolio
- Responsive design optimized for mobile and desktop
- Dark theme with cyan accent colors

### Technical Stack
- Built with: Vite, React.js, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- Hosted on: Vercel
- Domain: https://anandhu-kannan.in/
- HTTPS: Enabled with Let's Encrypt SSL certificate
- CDN: Vercel global edge network
